caption: The video captures a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, held from July 23 to 29, 2018. The speaker, dressed in a suit and standing behind a podium, is addressing an audience. The screen behind him displays two links: one for code related to "crypto-ml" on GitHub (https://github.com/axsauze/crypto-ml) and another for slides titled "industrial-airflow" (http://github.com/axsauze/industrial-airflow). The background of the slide features a network-like design with interconnected nodes, suggesting a theme related to data science, machine learning, or software development. The timestamp indicates that this particular segment of the presentation was recorded on July 26, 2018, at 14:38:31.
